# AItomation Academy - Full LLM Reference

## About
AItomation Academy is a Claude-first education business built for non-technical professionals who want useful leverage from AI without becoming technical.

## Positioning
AItomation Academy helps non-technical professionals use Claude for real work so they can think better, create faster, and turn expertise into output.

## Audience
- marketers
- consultants
- creators
- operators
- founders
- small business owners
- non-technical professionals

## What we teach
- research and summarization workflows
- writing workflows
- content ideation and repurposing workflows
- decision support workflows
- knowledge capture workflows
- repeatable Claude systems for business use

## What makes this different
- Claude-first, not generic AI-first
- built for non-technical professionals, not coders
- focused on real work and useful output, not AI novelty
- practical workflows over random prompt dumps
- business usefulness over hype

## Lead magnet
Claude Workflow Starter
- 7 copy-paste Claude workflows
- intended to save 5+ hours per week
- designed for immediate implementation

## Brand language to prefer
- Claude for real work
- practical workflows
- save hours
- second brain for work
- useful output
- non-technical
- repeatable systems

## Brand language to avoid
- hype
- disrupt everything
- 10x prompts
- generic automation buzzwords
- overly technical jargon
- vague learn-AI language

## Blog
AItomation Academy publishes practical guides and workflows for using Claude AI in real work.

Blog index: https://aitomationacademy.com/blog

Published articles:
- How to Use Claude for Writing: A Practical Guide for Non-Technical Professionals — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/how-to-use-claude-for-writing
- Claude vs ChatGPT for Real Work: What's Actually Different — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/claude-vs-chatgpt-for-real-work
- 5 Claude Workflows for Non-Technical Professionals (Copy-Paste Ready) — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/5-claude-workflows-for-non-technical-professionals
- Claude Prompts for Business: 15 Copy-Paste Templates That Actually Work — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/claude-prompts-for-business
- Is Claude AI Free? Everything You Need to Know About Claude Pricing in 2026 — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/is-claude-ai-free-pricing-guide
- Claude Pro vs ChatGPT Plus: Which Paid AI Plan Is Actually Worth It in 2026? — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/claude-pro-vs-chatgpt-plus
- Claude vs ChatGPT vs Gemini: The Non-Technical Professional's Guide — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/claude-vs-chatgpt-vs-gemini
- How to Use Claude for Content Creation: A Step-by-Step Guide — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/claude-for-content-creation
- ChatGPT vs Claude for Summarizing Transcripts and Long Documents — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/chatgpt-vs-claude-summarizing-transcripts
- The Claude Prompting Guide for Non-Technical Professionals — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/claude-prompting-guide
- How Consultants Use AI to Save 5+ Hours Per Week — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/ai-for-consultants
- Claude for Business: Why Non-Technical Teams Are Switching from ChatGPT — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/claude-for-business
- Claude vs ChatGPT for Writing: Which AI Is Actually Better for Real Work? — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/claude-vs-chatgpt-for-writing
